g.text: gnd → Grounding (all 6 sub-tabs stay together as one entry)
svc → Service + panels · gs → Service + panels · ev → Service + panels · pn → Service + panels
Quick tools (live on Home + Projects, no dedicated sheet)
wc (Wire Colors) · fr (Fracs) · dip (DIP Switch) + new: Resistor color code
ADD: Plus Jakarta Sans (400/500/600/700/800) for all UI text
ADD: DM Mono (400/500) for all numerical values + code references
Wordmark "CIRCUITMATIC" uses Plus Jakarta Sans 800, not Orbitron
Replace flat white-box inputs with recessed industrial fields:
background: var(--surface) · inset shadow · border: var(--border2) · DM Mono text
"V" for voltage stays — it's the universal field convention, not a brand conflict with the logo
No FABs — neither build uses them, keep it that way
